title: Add Web build and release-gate harness
summary: Create the repeatable Web product-gate build and harness for the current alpha content framework without changing simulation authority.
acceptance: Web build has a repeatable release-gate command or documented harness
Harness runs against real M5/M4-derived vertical-slice content, not an empty map
Chrome and Edge target assumptions are recorded
Build strategy records bundle-size, asset and cross-origin-isolation assumptions
UI, Pixi and React remain read-model consumers and do not become simulation authority

history.details: Instantiated from reviewed WM-0084 M6 DAG; keep proposed until WM-0085 is verified and done.

objective: Add the Web build and product-gate harness needed for later browser performance, storage and SharedArrayBuffer gates.
forbiddenPaths: M7 store or public playtest material
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: harness proves shell behavior but not product gate scale.
Risk: Web build requires a new dependency or hosting assumption.
File ownership is limited to Web app, UI/renderer/platform Web surfaces and docs.
ownerGate: Block on new runtime dependency, public protocol change or server requirement
Block if Web harness uses empty-world evidence
m0M5RegressionCoverage: M5 alpha content must remain product-gate fixture basis
benchmarkImpact: Defines future Web release-gate harness evidence; no benchmark threshold weakening.
reviewRouting: client-engineer completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies Web harness scope and authority boundaries.
rollbackModel: Revert Web harness/build changes and docs; later M6 Web evidence tasks remain proposed.

sparkEligibility.reason: Web product-gate harness spans app, renderer/platform surfaces and M6 product readiness.
